predicates.name: is_surviving_legally_cohabiting_partner_of
predicates.description: The first person is the surviving legally cohabiting partner of the second person (the deceased).

predicates.name: is_family_principal_residence
predicates.description: The property served as the family's principal residence at the time the estate of the deceased opened.

predicates.name: is_household_effects_of
predicates.description: The first property represents the household effects present in the second property (the principal residence).

predicates.name: called_to_estate_with_heirs
predicates.description: The first person (surviving partner) is called to the estate of the second person (deceased) together with any heirs.

predicates.name: subject_to_legal_reversion_4_24
predicates.description: The property is the subject of a right of legal reversion referred to in article 4.24.

predicates.name: subject_to_legal_reversion_4_25
predicates.description: The property is the subject of a right of legal reversion referred to in article 4.25.

predicates.name: subject_to_legal_reversion
predicates.description: The property is subject to a right of legal reversion under article 4.24 or 4.25.

predicates.name: acquires_usufruct_of_principal_residence
predicates.description: The surviving legally cohabiting partner acquires the usufruct of the immovable property that served as the family's principal residence from the estate of the deceased.

predicates.name: acquires_usufruct_of_household_effects
predicates.description: The surviving legally cohabiting partner acquires the usufruct of the household effects present in the family's principal residence from the estate of the deceased.

predicates.name: exercises_usufruct_of_principal_residence
predicates.description: The surviving legally cohabiting partner exercises the right of usufruct over the immovable property that served as the family's principal residence, notwithstanding a right of legal reversion.

predicates.name: exercises_usufruct_of_household_effects
predicates.description: The surviving legally cohabiting partner exercises the right of usufruct over the household effects present in the family's principal residence, notwithstanding a right of legal reversion.
